rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HANS HERBERT BARTSCH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Sua Sponte Reconsideration Of Order Granting Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Dr. Norman Herterich's Motion for Sua Sponte Reconsideration of Order Denying Summary Judgment is denied. If any party contests the tentative ruling and intends to argue the motion, they must notify opposing counsel and the court(415-551-3702) by 4:00 p.m. on March 2, 2016.
